## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Bridget (fwd.digital) and Odysseus (Minosia) to explore potential roles and fit at fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Odysseus has 5 years of experience at Minosia, scaling from 2 to 50 people, with roles spanning client success, operations, and process building](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [fwd.digital is rapidly scaling (30 to 100 clients by year-end), considering separate client-facing and operations roles](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Odysseus is open to both client-facing and operations roles, but needs to reflect on preference](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Miscommunication on meeting scope led to some unpreparedness, but valuable insights were still gained](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=2056.0)

## Topics

### Odysseus's Background and Experience

  - [Director of Client Success at Minosia for nearly 5 years](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Joined as first full-time employee, helped scale from 2 to \~50 people](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Previously worked in education sector, progressing through client-facing roles](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Experience with enterprise clients (e.g., Servicenow) and high-growth startups](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Skilled in process creation, client onboarding, relationship management, and cross-selling](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)

### fwd.digital's Growth and Role Considerations

  - [Currently at 30 clients, aiming for 100 by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)
  - [Considering separate roles for client-facing and operations due to rapid scaling](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Operations role would focus on building systems, tools (e.g., NPS), and processes across teams](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)
  - [Client-facing role would manage relationships, results, and cross-selling opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)

### Odysseus's Project Examples

  - [Refined client onboarding process: Added stakeholder interviews, expanded questionnaires, implemented Zapier automations](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
  - [Leveraged AI for parts of content briefing process](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - Converted small content audit engagement (\<$10k) into $200k+ annual client through trust-building and expansion

### Minosia's Current Structure

  - [\~30 customers, mix of recurring and project-based engagements](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [Focusing on enterprise clients and scale-ups with $10M+ ARR](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [Operations team closely collaborates with client success, managing deliverables and tool integrations](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Odysseus's Career Considerations

  - [Approaching 5-year mark at Minosia, feeling ready for a new challenge](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
  - [Impressed by Marcel (likely fwd.digital founder) and company's achievements](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
  - [Open to both client-facing and operations roles, needs to reflect on preference](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Odysseus to reflect on preference between client-facing and operations roles](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=1947.0)
  - [Bridget to discuss with Marcel about next steps and potential fit](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=2076.0)
  - [Possible follow-up call next week for further discussion and clarification](https://fathom.video/share/AzMy_1Ndq7xia1RwfpcHL4sjhd_BtodE?tab=summary&timestamp=2097.0)
